text:
rth makes one proficient in astrology.
The Sun and the Moon similarly placed favour political
science, psychology and metaphysics. Sun-Mercury
combination favours proficiency in mathematics. Venus in
the fourth, combined with Mercury or Sun, endows one
with poetical instincts.
The Sun and Mars having anything to do with Mercury
make one a logician. Jupiter similarly placed makes the
person an expert in Vedas and Vedangas. Here the planet
having to do most with the fourth house is to be considered
and not merely the house or the lord. Thus if Venus is lord
of the fourth and he is in the seventh with Mercury and
Mars and the fourth is occupied by Saturn and the Moon,
the person will be acquainted with different branches of
learning. Consistent with the inherent nature and
indications of the planet mainly connected with the fourth
house, either as lord, occupant or associate, one has to infer
the type of education one is likely to get. The Sun is the
king and the ruler.
